sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Compare before/after to see what RIGHT changed
before = last_transition.before_frame.segmentation
after = last_transition.after_frame.segmentation

# Compare green objects
before_n = [n for n in before['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'N']
after_n = [n for n in after['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'N']
print("Before green objects:", len(before_n))
for n in before_n:
    print("  id=%d pixels=%d boundary=%s" % (n['id'], n['pixels'], n['boundary']))
print("After green objects:", len(after_n))
for n in after_n:
    print("  id=%d pixels=%d boundary=%s" % (n['id'], n['pixels'], n['boundary']))
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
